languages.text: {n}Почти мгновенно по телу растекается жидкое пламя. Каждый ваш нерв пронзает боль. Спустя несколько секунд она начинает стихать... но не уходит полностью. Любое движение посылает в мозг крик агонии.{/n}

{n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads through your body. Pain pierces every nerve. After a few seconds, it begins to subside... but it does not go away completely. The slightest movement sends a scream of agony through your brain.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Почти мгновенно по телу растекается жидкое пламя. Каждый ваш нерв пронзает боль. Спустя несколько секунд она начинает стихать... но не уходит полностью. Любое движение посылает в мозг крик агонии.{/n}

{n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads through your body. Pain pierces every nerve. After a few seconds, it begins to subside... but it does not go away completely. The slightest movement sends a scream of agony through your brain.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ほとんど瞬時に、液状の炎が体中に広がる。痛みがあらゆる神経を貫く。数秒後には引き始めるが……完全には消えない。わずかな身じろぎでも、脳が悲鳴を上げるほどの激痛が走る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads through your body. Pain pierces every nerve. After a few seconds, it begins to subside... but it does not go away completely. The slightest movement sends a scream of agony through your brain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ほとんど瞬時に、液状の炎が体中に広がる。痛みがあらゆる神経を貫く。数秒後には引き始めるが……完全には消えない。わずかな身じろぎでも、脳が悲鳴を上げるほどの激痛が走る。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Presque instantanément, vous avez l'impression que des flammes liquides se répandent dans votre corps. La douleur jaillit de tous vos nerfs. Au bout de quelques secondes, elle commence à s'estomper... sans toutefois disparaître totalement. Le moindre mouvement provoque un lancinement atroce qui vous donne envie de hurler.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads through your body. Pain pierces every nerve. After a few seconds, it begins to subside... but it does not go away completely. The slightest movement sends a scream of agony through your brain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Presque instantanément, vous avez l'impression que des flammes liquides se répandent dans votre corps. La douleur jaillit de tous vos nerfs. Au bout de quelques secondes, elle commence à s'estomper... sans toutefois disparaître totalement. Le moindre mouvement provoque un lancinement atroce qui vous donne envie de hurler.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Neredeyse o anda sıvı alev, tüm vücuduna yayılıyor. Acı, her sinirini delip geçiyor. Birkaç saniye sonra azalmaya başlıyor... Fakat tamamen geçmiyor. En ufak bir hareket, beynine dayanılmaz bir acı olarak dönüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads through your body. Pain pierces every nerve. After a few seconds, it begins to subside... but it does not go away completely. The slightest movement sends a scream of agony through your brain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Neredeyse o anda sıvı alev, tüm vücuduna yayılıyor. Acı, her sinirini delip geçiyor. Birkaç saniye sonra azalmaya başlıyor... Fakat tamamen geçmiyor. En ufak bir hareket, beynine dayanılmaz bir acı olarak dönüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Casi al instante, sientes fuego líquido recorrer tu cuerpo. El dolor atraviesa todos y cada uno de tus nervios. Al cabo de unos segundos, empieza a amortiguarse... pero no desaparece por completo. Cada movimiento, por pequeño que sea, causa un chirrido agónico en tu cerebro.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads through your body. Pain pierces every nerve. After a few seconds, it begins to subside... but it does not go away completely. The slightest movement sends a scream of agony through your brain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Casi al instante, sientes fuego líquido recorrer tu cuerpo. El dolor atraviesa todos y cada uno de tus nervios. Al cabo de unos segundos, empieza a amortiguarse... pero no desaparece por completo. Cada movimiento, por pequeño que sea, causa un chirrido agónico en tu cerebro.{/n}

languages.text: {n}霎时间，火焰般的灼热流经全身，疼痛刺击着每一根神经。几秒后，疼痛开始减弱……但并未完全消失。最轻微的动作都会在你脑中引发痛苦的尖叫。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost instantly, liquid flame spreads through your body. Pain pierces every nerve. After a few seconds, it begins to subside... but it does not go away completely. The slightest movement sends a scream of agony through your brain.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}霎时间，火焰般的灼热流经全身，疼痛刺击着每一根神经。几秒后，疼痛开始减弱……但并未完全消失。最轻微的动作都会在你脑中引发痛苦的尖叫。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Beinahe sofort breitet sich eine flüssige Flamme in deinem Körper aus. Der Schmerz reizt jeden Nerv. Nach einigen Sekunden lässt er nach ... verschwindet aber nicht vollständig. Die kleinste Bewegung jagt einen Aufschrei der Agonie durch dein Gehirn.{/n}
